positive: A highly detailed, centralized illustration featuring celestial floral elements and mystical fauna. The main subject is a glowing, stylized moon surrounded by intricate vines, cosmic nebulae patterns, and delicate flora like glowing lotuses and stylized galaxies. Include elegant elements of mythic deer silhouettes and stylized constellations formed by fine gold lines. The style must be neo-traditional tattoo flash meets modern vector art, achieving strong graphic lines and clean silhouettes. Use a limited, highly contrasting color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, dusty rose, and vibrant gold metallic ink accents. The composition must be balanced, symmetrical, and perfectly centered, designed to look flawless as a direct apparel print. Studio lighting, high contrast, clean lines, crisp edges.
negative: ugly, tiling, sketch, low quality, blurry, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, mutated, watermark, signature, text, writing, logo, jpeg artifacts, grainy, noise, out of focus, low detail, poorly rendered hands
